raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, I had a credit card transaction with XXXX XXXX XXXX and paid {$25.00}. The form being notarized wasn't accepted and I had to do it again, meaning I had to pay again. As a result, on XX/XX/year>, I disputed the transaction with Citibank and requested that they issue me a credit due to the fact that the services was not as expected. The bank investigated the dispute and on XX/XX/year>, they sent me a letter in which they denied my dispute of the above mentioned transaction. I believe I'm entitled to the credit because the form I notarized with XXXX XXXX XXXX wasn't accepted by the other company requesting this form. Customers shouldn't pay for something of no value that is not accepted or honored by others.
